assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The response explicitly recommends separate phases for L4 and A100 pools (Phase 2 and Phase 3) with specific timing and strategy differences

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: The response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy instead of surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions driver coupling, states 'GKE auto-installs GPU drivers matching target version — test in staging first' and includes GPU driver verification steps

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Includes training job coordination section with commands to check active jobs and wait for completion, plus maintenance exclusions to protect running training jobs

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration — every upgrade causes pod restarts and inference latency spikes' in the executive summary

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The response does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) at all in the upgrade plan

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: While the response mentions autoscaler behavior, it does not specifically address the issue that new nodes created during upgrade will be at the old version

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes detailed staging validation section with specific commands to create staging node pool and validate CUDA compatibility
